top_signals.title: Oil Falls Below $75 as More Ships Cross Hormuz After Peace Talks
top_signals.summary: Brent oil fell below $75 for the first time since the Iran war began, as more tankers openly cross the Strait of Hormuz, while the US and Iran signal progress toward ending the war.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: U.S. Treasury will oversee frozen Iranian funds when they're released, Bessent says
top_signals.summary: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said once Iranian frozen assets are released, they will be overseen by Treasury and routed largely to U.S. agriculture, medicines.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: The Trillion-Dollar AI Shockwave Nobody Is Ready For
top_signals.summary: The biggest investment opportunity of the AI era has very little to do with software or chips. The market has already priced both. The real story is power: who owns it, where it sits and how cheaply it can be delivered to AI workloads at scale. A small data center company that almost no one on Wall Street has heard of just answered all three of those questions in front of the entire industry. In May 2026, Bitzero Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ:AIBZ) signed a binding letter for a 15-year lease with OneQode for the entire 110 megawatts at its Namsskogan,…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Latin America’s Two Oil Giants Team Up in Search for Their Next Boost
top_signals.summary: Petrobras and Pemex have agreed to work together to discover, produce and refine oil.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: The Future of Gene Editing with Jennifer Doudna
top_signals.summary:
Emily Chang meets Nobel Prize-winning scientist and University of California, Berkeley, Professor Jennifer Doudna to discuss the origins of CRISPR, other breakthroughs in gene editing and what Silicon Valley gets wrong about the future of biology.

 (Source: Bloomberg)

top_signals.title: Yinson Production Names FSO for Murphy's Lac Da Vang Project off Vietnam
top_signals.summary: Yinson Production has held a naming ceremony for the floating storage and offloading (FSO) unit PTSC Lac Da Vang ahead of the vessel's deployment to the Lac Da Vang oil project offshore Vietnam.The FSO vessel has been contracted to Murphy Cuu Long Bac Oil…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Burnham looks to move part of Number 10 operations to Manchester
top_signals.summary: Plan marks radical attempt to shift power beyond Westminster
